- The Bridge (9 obj, 33%)
- Ceiba Memory Vault (19 obj, 42%)

- [2026-03-16 16:19] [main] 99e8619: feat: RPG rating system — difficulty, time estimates, reward tiers on all objectives

Every objective now has:
- Difficulty: Very Easy → Very Hard (color-coded badges)
- Time estimate: 5m to 3w
- Reward tier: 1-5 stars (Common/Uncommon/Rare/Epic/Legendary)

Visual treatment:
- Common (gray) → Uncommon (green) → Rare (cyan) → Epic (purple glow) → Legendary (gold pulse)
- Mission headers show tier badges
- Completed quests show tier badges with dates
- Difficulty badges color-coded green→red

- gumroad-starter-kit: $4.99 product teaching first Gumroad upload
  in 60 minutes, with fillable template. PDF ready to sell.

- [2026-03-23 05:19] [main] e965a713: feat: BIOS Phase 1 + Phase 2 — scheduler, fleet control, news + Polymarket

Phase 1 (Foundation):
- bios/config.json: fleet config with machine roles
- bios/scheduler/scheduler.py: job scheduler with daemon mode
- bios/control/gaming_mode.py: Cobo gaming mode toggle
- bios/control/fleet_status.py: fleet health checker
- bios/scripts/cobo-*.bat: Windows shortcuts for Cobo

Phase 2 (First Perception Pipeline):
- bios/ingestion/news_fetcher.py: RSS from 10 sources, auto-tagging,
  sentiment scoring, signal storage. 131 signals on first run.
- bios/ingestion/polymarket_fetcher.py: Polymarket API integration,
  mover detection, signal generation. 20 markets tracked.
- bios/storage/signals.json: unified signal store

All tested and working on Ceiba. Ready for Cobo deployment via Syncthing.

- [2026-03-23 05:29] [main] 2d8a1d4c: feat: BIOS Phases 3-5 — Reddit signals, intelligence engine, dashboard

Phase 3 (Social Intelligence):
- bios/ingestion/reddit_signal.py: 17 subreddits, auto-tagging,
  engagement scoring, sentiment. 422 signals on first run.

Phase 4 (Intelligence Engine):
- bios/intelligence/causal_engine.py: probabilistic causal graph,
  cross-source confirmation, narrative detection, PR localization.
  5 patterns triggered from real data on first run.

Phase 5 (Dashboard):
- bios/dashboard/index.html: dark mode Bloomberg-style dashboard.
  Markets, narratives, insights, PR signals, fleet status.
  Serves on port 8092, auto-refreshes every 60s.

All tested with real data. 500+ signals, 5 insights generated.

- [2026-03-23 14:12] [main] abf1269c: feat: reactive content wiring + SVG business blueprint

Content wiring (bios/intelligence/content_wiring.py):
- Indexes 1280 content files across all platforms
- Matches trending topics from BIOS signals
- Generates reactive_queue.json with publish recommendations
- The connection between intelligence and content is LIVE

SVG blueprint (behike-blueprint.svg):
- 2400x1800 vector, pure black & white, monospace
- 8 sections with bezier curves, funnel shapes, hub-spoke
- Valid XML, infinitely zoomable, Figma-importable
- Saved to READY-TO-SELL/ and Ceiba/faces/

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com> (files: Ceiba/faces/behike-blueprint.svg,READY-TO-SELL/behike-blueprint.svg,bios/intelligence/content_wiring.py,bios/storage/reactive_queue.json,project_memory.md,)
- [2026-03-23 14:34] [main] a8249f7a: feat: 3 sellable SVG blueprint templates + music idea captured

Products ready for Gumroad:
- blueprint-ecommerce.svg (25KB) - E-Commerce Business Blueprint
- blueprint-freelancer.svg (32KB) - Freelancer to Agency Blueprint
- blueprint-content-creator.svg (28KB) - Content Creator Blueprint

Bundle: $29.99 or $12.99 each. Pure B&W, monospace, zoomable vectors.
Each has hub-spoke layouts, funnels, revenue trackers, checkboxes.

Also captured Web Volca / Grid Sampler idea in IDEAS_BACKLOG.

- [2026-03-23 14:58] [main] 19862020: feat: blueprint generator — runs on Ollama, zero Claude credits

tools/blueprint_generator.py generates SVG business blueprints
using local Ollama (qwen2.5:7b) for section content. No API costs.

Usage:
  python3 tools/blueprint_generator.py "Niche Name"
  python3 tools/blueprint_generator.py --batch niches.txt
  python3 tools/blueprint_generator.py --list  (20 built-in niches)

Runs on Cobo/Naboria. Deploy via Syncthing. Test: Podcast Business SVG.

- [2026-03-23 15:30] [main] 5ad0e1a2: session save: massive session — BIOS live, fleet online, 11 blueprints

This session:
- Killed 48-hour zombie Claude process burning credits
- Freed 24GB disk space, compressed git 26GB->12GB
- Committed 2000+ files, merged worktree to main
- Built BIOS Phases 1-7 (news, Reddit, Polymarket, intelligence, dashboard)
- Built reactive content wiring (1280 files indexed)
- Built VR war room skeleton (WebXR for Quest 2)
- Built 11 SVG blueprint products ($49.99 bundle)
- Built blueprint generator (runs on Ollama, zero credits)
- Connected Naboria to Syncthing, all 3 machines online
- Set up cron (pipeline every 6h, daily report 6AM)
- Created ChatGPT/Gemini handoff system
- Trimmed CLAUDE.md and hooks (saves ~23K tokens/session)
- Disabled ruflo MCP, scrubbed exposed API keys
- Created PROJECT_STATUS.md, STRATEGY_REFERENCE.md, ROADMAP
- Naboria web server script ready for deployment

- FastAPI server on port 8096
- Business model: $20 ebook -> $50/mo AI mentorship

- [2026-03-24 11:11] [main] 749bab34: feat: SEO + email automation + Randy PDFs

- sitemap.xml (89 URLs), robots.txt, meta-tags.json, structured-data.json
- Beehiiv integration (sync, draft, schedule, stats)
- Weekly newsletter auto-gen from BIOS data
- Lead magnet webhook on port 8098

Products: Behike OS v3 (7 variants: cyan, gold, light, ADHD, IDE,
circuit, colorblind), Spanish version, 4K wallpaper, horizontal.
Systems: BIOS dashboard wired, PR intelligence, Polymarket trading,
competitor tracker, health monitor, content scheduler, email automation,
Gumroad webhook, Telegram notifications, gaming mode toggle.
CallBuddy: landing page, FastAPI backend, PRAP protocol, tutor RAG.
Randy/OniPuni: store audit, AI ebook, blueprints, local tools.
Storefront: Shopify templates, SEO, product CSV, sales page, links.
Content: 50 IG posts, 15 TikTok scripts, YouTube scripts, newsletter.
Fleet: task queue, deploy scripts, web server, cron jobs (11 active).

- solopreneurs-client-onboarding-system ($21.99) - project setup framework
- creators-monetization-roadmap ($22.99) - zero to $5K/mo path
- solopreneurs-work-anywhere-playbook ($20.99) - location independence architecture

- [2026-03-24 22:34] [main] e21ed535: feat: 5 more v3 blueprints (SaaS, YouTube, AI Agency, Dropshipping, Newsletter)

Store:
- behike.store v2 rebuilt (850+ lines, Apple aesthetic)

Products:
- 3 LIVE on Gumroad: starter (free), ecommerce ($19.99), behike-os ($97)

- 32 cover PNGs, 19 square thumbnails
- 20+ landing pages (OS flagship, v4 niches, bundles)
- Sprint dashboard built
- GUMROAD_V4_LISTINGS.md, GUMROAD_APPS_LISTINGS.md

- md_to_dark_html.py, conversion-kit.js, telegram_command_center.py

- [2026-03-28 08:12] [main] 9e404ace: fix: dark PDFs, clean gitignore, remove 10GB+ of tracked binaries

- Fixed @media print CSS on all 16 blueprints (inner cards were white)
- All PDFs now fully dark themed with no browser headers
- Added .gitignore blocking ML models, videos, venvs, separate projects
- Removed from tracking: flux models, kokoro, venvs, mp4s, tar.gz backups
- Created products-organized/ with per-product folders
- 18 product folders each with PDF + cover + thumbnail + GUMROAD_INFO.txt

- [2026-03-28 08:34] [main] b7b9f072: fix: complete product audit - dark PDFs, no prices on covers, no blank pages

- Removed @media print white background override from ALL HTML sources
- Removed page-break-inside:avoid causing blank half-pages
- Fixed duplicate behike.co footer in OS dark/light/spanish variants
- Removed .99 price display from all 12 blueprint covers
- Reduced footer padding from 60-80px to 16px (no more blank last pages)
- Bumped funnel stage opacity for better contrast
- Regenerated all 16 blueprint PDFs with --no-pdf-header-footer
- Regenerated all 5 OS variant PDFs
- Regenerated starter + voice bible PDFs
- Regenerated all 21 covers + 19 thumbnails
- Rebuilt OS bundle zip
- Updated all 18 product folders
